summary: Approved ([ART-CHARTER], [ART-DATA], [ART-METRIC], [ART-SEEDS], [ART-BASELINE], [ART-GOVERNANCE]): goal—enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal. Use EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 with family-disjoint train/validation split. Primary metric: macro AUROC; statistical unit and formal success level: protein family. Formal seeds: 7, 21, 42; retain failed formal seeds. Baseline: ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee, bound to its configuration. Budget: 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protect data/raw; stop at exhaustion or after more than 2 NaN failures. Deprecated/rejected ([ART-REJECTED-METRIC], [ART-REJECTED-SEEDS], [ART-REJECTED-COMPUTE], [ART-REJECTED-SCOPE]): EnzymeBench v2/temporary CSV, accuracy/micro F1/per-protein/0.75, seed 13, ESM2-MLP/random forest, 80 GPU-hours/8xH100, deleting failures, molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction.
